title: General or special privileges on movables.
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3--OF PRIVILEGES ON MOVABLES

Art. 3190.  General or special privileges on movables.

Privileges are either general, or special on certain movables.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 3--OF PRIVILEGES ON MOVABLES
Art. 3190.  General or special privileges on movables.
Privileges are either general, or special on certain movables.
